panel_data.csv.description: Balanced panel dataset for DID regression analysis of a 2020 policy shock on firm revenue growth.

columns.treated: 1 if firm is in the treatment group, 0 otherwise
columns.revenue_growth_pct: Outcome variable: annual revenue growth percentage
columns.rd_intensity: R&D expenditure as fraction of revenue (control)

notes: Cluster standard errors at firm_id level
